function.name: agents.List
function.description: List all currently working contractor agents.

function.name: agents.Hire
function.description: Hire a contractor agent with a unique name and a task prompt.

function.name: agents.Fire
function.description: Fire a contractor agent with a unique name.

function.name: agents.Quit
function.description: Finish your work with a status message to the hiring agent.

message.description: The status message. If it contains "my work is done" the current process exits with a success.
